user.title: School Menu Configuration
user.description: Configure the PDF source and menu structure for your school.

data.settimane_ciclo: Number of weeks in the cycle
data.portate_per_giorno: Courses per day (only used in 'fixed' mode)

data_description.modalita_blocco: How the integration detects where one day ends and the next begins in the PDF table. Use 'auto' if unsure.
data_description.portate_nomi: Enter the names of the courses in the order they appear in the PDF. Example: first course, second course, side dish, fruit, bread
data_description.portate_per_giorno: Only used when 'fixed' mode is selected. Must match the number of course names entered above.

error.invalid_date: Invalid date format. Please use YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. 2025-09-15).
error.portate_nomi_mismatch: The number of course names must match the number of courses per day set above.

options.auto: Auto (empty row or new day — recommended)
